text: Here's what science actually says about nicotine acetylcholine. Nicotine interacts with acetylcholine receptors, influencing brain functions. But did you know that this interaction can enhance attention and memory? Research indicates that nicotine may temporarily boost cognitive functions. But here's the catch: long-term effects are still being studied. So while nicotine can enhance, it also complicates brain chemistry. Want to dive deeper into neuroscience? Hit that follow for more!
